message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>To distinguish waning of vaccine responses from differential variant protection, we performed a test-negative case-control analysis during a Delta variant-dominant period in California’s prisons. We found that infection odds increased each 28-day period post-vaccination, reaching 3.4-fold (residents) to 4.7-fold (staff) increased odds of infection after 180 days.</jats:p>
title: Waning of Vaccine-Conferred Protection against SARS-CoV-2 Infection: Matched Case-Control Test-Negative Design Study in Two High-Risk Populations
